ocr.text: In the December 2023 report for Hyatt Hotels, the Business Travel metrics indicate a Total Revenue of CNY 50M with a
Performance Indicator of 75% occupancy rate, an Average Daily Rate of CNY 800, and a Market Share of 15% with a change
in total revenue of CNY 25M and a market share of 60%. For Corporate Clients, the Booking Volume stands at 4,000 with a
Rate of Return at 65%, and a Booking Value of CNY 35M yielding a Client Satisfaction of 80%. Frequent Travelers show a
Booking Increase of 20% and a Retention Rate of 90%, which translates to 3,000 Room Nights and a Growth Rate of 80%.
Event Bookings comprise 150 Corporate Events generating Event Revenue of CNY 10M, with 5 Sponsorship Deals. Local
Partnerships report 10 New Collaborations, a Revenue Share of CNY 3M, and Customer Feedback reflecting positive ratings at
85%, with negative ratings at 10%, and a Satisfaction Score of 4.5. The Competitor Revenue is CNY 45M with a Market
Growth of 6%, while Future Projections estimate a 2024 Revenue Target of CNY 60M. In Cruise Passenger Metrics, Passenger
Volume increased to 1,200,000 with a Growth Rate of 9.09%, generating Revenue of CNY 2.5B and an Average Spend of CNY
2,083. Operational Ratios show a Current Ratio of 1.5 and a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.4, reflecting a Net Profit Margin of 15%.
